meImpactBody: Your reports covered ~{km2} km² across {zones} map zones.
meImpactGoal: Map {n} more zones to earn Coverage Hero.
meEmptyBody: Submit your first damage report to start earning badges and tracking your impact.
badgeFirstResponderDesc: Among the first 50 reporters in a crisis zone.
badgeFirstResponderHow: Be early — the first 50 reporters in a crisis earn this.
badgePioneerDesc: First to map a 100m zone in a crisis.
badgePioneerHow: Report from a spot no one else has covered yet.
badgeVerifiedDesc: Three or more reports the AI scored high-confidence.
badgeVerifiedHow: Submit clear photos — 3 high-confidence reports unlock this.
badgeCoverageHeroDesc: Mapped 5+ distinct 100m zones in one crisis.
badgeCoverageHeroHow: Spread your reports across 5 distinct zones in one crisis.
badgeStreakHow: Submit at least one report a day for 3 days running.
badgeDetailExpertDesc: Added extended context to two or more reports.
badgeDetailExpertHow: Fill in electricity, health, or community details on 2 reports.
badgeCommunityVoiceDesc: Submitted 25 or more reports across all crises.
badgeCommunityVoiceHow: Keep reporting — 25 total reports earns this.
leaderboardPrivacyBody: No personal information is shown. Nicknames are auto-generated and cannot be linked to any individual.
leaderboardFooter: Probable duplicate reports are excluded from the count.
landingEyebrow: Built for the UNDP Crisis Mapping Challenge
landingHeroSub: CrisisMapper lets civilians in disaster zones submit geotagged damage assessments via an offline-first PWA. AI-assisted classification delivers structured data to response teams in real time.
landingFeat1: Reports submitted in the demo — a scenario modeled on the 2025 Myanmar earthquake
landingFeat2: of AI severity suggestions are reviewed and confirmed by a human reporter before submission
landingFeat3: network data needed to file a report after first load — offline-first with background sync
landingFeat4: UN languages plus Swahili, with full RTL support
errorBody: An unexpected error occurred. You can return home and try again.
error404Body: The page you’re looking for doesn’t exist or has moved.
confirmImpact: Your reports covered ~{km2} km² of the crisis zone.
reportCoverageHint: Every report widens coverage — keep mapping your area.
title: Report Damage
tip1: Stand directly in front of the building
tip2: Don't include people in the frame
tip3: Take photo in daylight if possible
heicError: HEIC photos aren't supported — please use the camera button
photoError: Could not process photo — please try again
blurWarning: Photo seems blurry — retake for better results
faceWarning: People detected — retake without people for privacy
aiPending: AI classification will run after upload
aiUnavailable: AI classification was unavailable for this photo. Please rely on your own judgment to choose a severity level.
aiOffline: AI offline — your call. The form will still save your report.
gpsDenied: GPS denied — type a Plus Code below
photoFailedNote: Report submitted, but the photo could not be uploaded.
confirmBody: Your report is now part of the {crisis} damage map, visible to response analysts in real time.
syncSub: Reports saved locally. Upload when connected.
queuedBody: Your report is saved on this device. We will send it automatically the next time you have a connection.
submitError: We could not save this report on your device. Free up some storage and try again.
installSub: Add to home screen for offline access.
landingTagline: Report damage from any phone, anywhere — even without internet.
exportFailed: Export failed — sign in as staff and try again.
modalModerationNote: Sign in as staff to verify or flag reports.
feedEmpty: No reports yet. New submissions appear here in real time.
mapWebglMsg: Your browser doesn’t support WebGL2, which this map requires. Please update to a recent version of Chrome, Safari, Firefox, or Edge.
dashEmptyBody: Pan or zoom out, widen the time range, or clear filters to see more.
crisisBadgeOutside: Your location isn’t inside a known crisis zone. Please choose the event you’re reporting for.
